text:
22 = Site has on-site affiliate emergency room 
Null = This information has not been reported by the pharmacy 

COMMENT: This variable is new in 2012. This information is optional, and not required to be reported by 
pharmacies to NCPDP. 

Additional details regarding the National Council for Prescription Drug Programs (NCPDP) source data 
are available at: http://dataq.ncpdp.org/.
